overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark, stormy swamp at night. The character traverses a wooden bridge and continues along winding dirt paths through wetlands with grassy banks and rocky outcrops.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the swamp path toward a wooden bridge in the distance

entered.detail: dark stagnant water reflecting the cloudy night sky
narrow winding trail through the wetlands
dark silhouette of trees against the stormy sky
tall green grass lining the path edges

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt path through a dark swamp at night, with water visible on the left and grassy banks on both sides. The path leads toward a wooden bridge in the distance under an overcast, stormy sky.

events.description: steps onto wooden bridge crossing over the swamp water
exits the bridge and steps back onto dirt path

agents.ego_description: carefully crossing the wooden bridge over the swamp water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a narrow crossing over the water
collapsed wooden debris floating in the water beside the bridge

segments.scene_description: Crossing a narrow wooden bridge over dark swamp water, with broken timbers visible in the water on the left. The bridge planks show signs of wear and blood stains, while the surrounding wetlands extend into the darkness.

agents.ego_description: walking through open wetlands with grassy hills rising on both sides

entered.detail: rolling green hills covered in tall grass and shrubs
sparse pine trees dotting the wetland landscape

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the dirt path through open wetlands, with grassy hills rising on both sides and scattered pine trees visible in the distance. The stormy night sky provides minimal light as the path winds through the natural landscape.

agents.ego_description: walking through a more enclosed section with rocky outcrops flanking the path

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders and rocky formations lining the trail
leafless white birch trees standing among the rocks

segments.scene_description: The path narrows between rocky outcrops and moss-covered boulders, creating a more enclosed feeling. Dead birch trees and scattered pines line the trail as the character continues through the rugged wetland terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, stormy swamp that transitions from open wetlands into a rugged, enclosed terrain. It begins along a narrow dirt path flanked by water and grassy banks, moving steadily toward a distant wooden bridge under an overcast sky. As the camera crosses the weathered bridge, the view reveals broken timbers and blood-stained planks over the dark swamp water before returning to a winding path through open wetlands and distant pine trees. The scene then shifts as the landscape tightens, with the path narrowing between rocky outcrops and moss-covered boulders. Finally, the movement leads through a dense corridor of dead birch trees and scattered pines, deepening the sense of isolation within the rugged wetland.
